title: Flip-Flop State Transition Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental operation of a D Flip-Flop, showing how input, clock signal, and current state determine the next state.
relationships: The Next State (Q_next) is set to the value of the Data Input (D) only on the active edge (e.g., rising edge) of the Clock Signal (CLK), otherwise the state remains unchanged (Q_next = Q).
